dialogos.texto_en: Look, Uesugi-san!\nIt's a blue sea and a white sandy beach!
I've been looking at it the whole time.
This feels like a great vacation, doesn't it?\nDon't you feel like running around?
I can understand that.\nThe feeling of wanting to run towards the sea.
Oh, you totally get it!\nYou and I are on the same page, huh!
On the same page...?
I prefer to admire the view from the beach.\nI also enjoy swimming a little, though.
Why is that? Swimming in the sea feels so refreshing!
It's because it tires me out quickly,\nand I can't enjoy it for very long.
Miku doesn't have much stamina.
You don't either.
But I like the feeling\nof being exhausted after swimming.
Right now, I felt a huge emotional barrier between Yotsuba and I.
Me too.
Whaa?!\nWhy is there suddenly an emotional barrier between us?!
There's a line that can't be crossed\nbetween teams that can exercise and those that can't.
Then, let's make an opening in the barrier\nand try to understand each other!\nLet's make peace!
Okay, how about playing in the sand?\nThat doesn't tire you out, does it?
Sand is heavy.
Huh...\nMiku, are you saying that you can't lift\nanything heavier than chopsticks?
However, it's true\nthat many beach activities are tiring.
I'm sure there are other activities\nthat don't require as much physical exertion.\nThe ones I thought of do, though.
By the way, do you have anything else you want to do?
I want to go diving!\nI want to try the proper scuba diving\nwith a scuba tank on my back.
Scuba diving, huh.\nBut don't you need a license for that?
You need a license to do it alone,\nbut it seems like beginners can do it\non trial diving tours.
Oh, I see.
Yes, it said that if you're with an instructor\nwho has a license, there's no issue.
You're so knowledgeable, Yotsuba.
I looked it up before we left.\nIf it seems possible, I want to give it a try.
Diving...
What do you think, Miku? Are you interested?
I'd like to see the world underwater, but I'm\nnot good at physical activities. I might end up causing\ntrouble for everyone if my legs cramp up.
I can't help feeling anxious\nabout the unexpected things that might happen\nunderwater.
Oh my!\nYou two are only thinking about\nthe things that could go wrong before even trying!
If it's a tour for beginners, they'll teach us nice and easy,\nso I'm sure it'll be okay!
So, we won't know until we try.\nWho knows, we might love it.
Hmmm...
That's right, Miku.\nIt's not good to feel scared before giving it a try.
Why are you talking like it's someone else's problem?\nYou said you were anxious earlier too.
It just means I'm a little anxious.\nIt doesn't mean I don't want to do it.
Excuses...
Miku, you're not really afraid of water though, right?
Yeah, I can swim.
Then you'll be fine! Challenge yourself.
...Fine, if there's an opportunity.
Okay, it's a promise then.
Speaking of which...\nwe're talking like we're completely set on going diving,\nbut was it in the itinerary for this trip?
No, unfortunately it wasn't.\nThe reservations for the beginner tour were full.
If it's a beginner tour, then it should be doable.
Yes, it should be.\nAll we have to do is take the first step and try!
In the beginner tour, \nthey start-off by teaching you from the basics, right?
Yes, they should teach us carefully\nso it's not dangerous.
Well then, it should be okay.
That's right, that's the way!
If Futaro's doing it, then I will too.
Yeah! It'll be fun if we all dive together!
Speaking of which...\nwe're talking like we're completely set on going diving,\nbut was it in the itinerary for this trip?
No, unfortunately it wasn't.\nThe reservations for the beginner tour were full.
You really looked into this huh.\nYou even looked up the tour?
Ahaha...\nActually, I've been researching fun things to do\non this graduation trip here and there.
Since we're all going on this trip together,\nI want to enjoy it to the fullest and leave without any regrets.
That's right.\nDoing some research before a trip is important.
It sure is!
I won't let your efforts go to waste.\nIf it's a beginner tour, and everyone's up for it,\nlet's give it a try.
If Futaro's doing it, then I will too.
Yeah! Let's do it together!
Speaking of which...\nwe're talking like we're completely set on going diving,\nbut was it in the itinerary for this trip?
No, unfortunately it wasn't.\nThe reservations for the beginner tour were full.
But! Next time we come to Okinawa,\nwe absolutely have to do it!\nMiku agreed to give it a try!
Yeah, I'll give it a shot.
And once we've graduated from beginners,\nlet's go to a place known for diving\nlike Ishigaki Island and Miyako Island and dive.
I remember you mentioning before\nthat you wanted to go to Ishigaki Island\nand Miyako Island.
You have to take a plane to get there.\nOkinawa is bigger than I thought.
Yeah.\nIt's a fascinating place with so much to explore\nthat a few days is not enough.
Then let's come as many times as we need to.\nLet's enjoy Okinawa to the fullest, together!
A remote island, huh?\nWe don't have enough time to visit this time around.
That's too bad.
You have to take a plane to get there.\nOkinawa is bigger than I thought.
Yeah.\nIt's a fascinating place with so much to explore\nthat a few days is not enough.
Then let's come as many times as we need to.\nLet's enjoy Okinawa to the fullest, together!
